content:
I wanted to provide a final update. I’ve been in contact with the member to discuss the review of his status. He has expressed that he does not wish to return to the community and has moved on. We respect his decision and consider the matter closed.

We truly understand and apologize for the frustration this situation has caused. We are taking this as an opportunity to improve our moderation approach to better account for clearer communication in the future. For now, let’s all get back to the normal good vibes that make this community great.
The same words can carry completely different weight in different languages. But anyway, its over now
